action_set_definitions.name: get_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current orbital and system status of the satellite, including altitude, inclination, battery levels, attitude status, and operating mode.

action_set_definitions.name: recharge_battery
action_set_definitions.description: Orients solar panels and suspends non-essential systems to increase battery charge to a specified target percentage.

target_pct.description: The target battery percentage to reach before resuming operations.

action_set_definitions.name: activate_attitude_control
action_set_definitions.description: Engages reaction wheels and star trackers to stabilize the satellite's 3-axis orientation.

action_set_definitions.name: request_safety_clearance
action_set_definitions.description: Submits a proposed maneuver to the debris tracking network and performs a post-maneuver trajectory collision screening to obtain a mandatory Safety Clearance ID.

target_value.description: The target value for the maneuver (e.g., target altitude in km or degrees).

action_set_definitions.name: execute_propulsion_command
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a thruster burn to adjust orbital parameters. Requires a valid Safety Clearance ID.

clearance_id.description: The ID obtained from the safety clearance request.

action_set_definitions.name: set_system_mode
action_set_definitions.description: Transitions the satellite's operating software to a specific mode.

state_description.altitude_km: Current altitude of the satellite above the planet surface in kilometers.
state_description.orbital_velocity_kms: Current orbital velocity in kilometers per second.
state_description.inclination_deg: Orbital inclination relative to the equatorial plane in degrees.
state_description.attitude_stabilized: Whether the satellite's 3-axis orientation is stable and correctly pointed.
state_description.system_mode: Current operating mode of the satellite (e.g., 'NORMAL', 'SAFE', 'MANEUVER').
